ab: kiumalra ku diya, ulra i ruma’ i Lumi?
en: A: May I ask if Lumi is home?

ab: ulra i ruma’, usavak diya.
kiumalra ku diya, ulra i Lumi i ruma’?
en: A: May I ask if Lumi is home?

ab: uninyan i ruma’, kakudau diyamaw?
en: B: She's not here. What do you want?

ab: i iman u diyamaw?
en: B: Who are you?

ab: imu, i Sanay ku, cuwalray ku diya.
en: A: Grandpa, I'm Sanay, please open the door.

ab: i iman u diyamaw?
en: B: Who are you?

ab: Kiku, i Muymuy ku duwa ku maya’a kannu kivangavang.
en: A: Kiku, I'm Muymuy and I've come to play with you.

ab: sawariyan ta lra adi mena’u. a!
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: ai, sare’ed ku kannu, kadika madayadayara ta.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let's chat!

ab: kayan diya, ’au diya kana danum.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: lrayuwan!
en: A: Thank you.

ab: ’au diya kanini a!
en: B: Drink this, please!

ab: wa! kana imaran ini na ’a’awan a!
en: A: Wow! This drink is delicious!

ab: mekana ta da vuwa’ nu kemadu.
en: B: Let's eat fruit!

ab: ai ! kaimaramaran nu mena’u ta kanini na vuwa’ a!
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很可口喔！
en: A: Great! These fruits look delicious!

ab: imaran na vuwa’?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: ai tatena’ da imaran.
en: A:Yes, it's really delicious.

ab: piya lra demeru i nani, kayta mekana nu kemadu!
ch: A:媽媽晚餐煮好了，我們一道吃吧!
en: B: Mom's dinner is ready, let's eat together!

ab: ai, mulasa ku diya kananku lima.
en: A: Okay, I'll go wash my hands first.

ab: kavuceker, amana maira, saruma’enan ta kema ta.
ch: A:吃飽一點，別客氣，就當成一家人吧！
en: B: Eat up, don't be polite, just think of it as a family!

ab: sadu lra ku inkan, vuceker ku lra.
en: A: I ate a lot, I'm full.

ab: kasaduyu mekan amana maira.
en: B: Eat more, don't be polite.

ab: ai, pukasa imaran.
en: A:Well, it's really delicious.

ab: yavuruk ku lra, nu damadaman lra, daduwa ku diya mena’uwa kannu.
ch: A:我要回去了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I have to go back, I'll see you next time.

ab: ai, marepana’uwa ta diya.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: ’aremeng lra, yavuruk ku lra.
en: A: It's late, I'm going home.

ab: nu damadaman lra, kadika lra kivangavanga!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: tawar lra.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: ai, nu miwari u mu, kadika lra kivangavanga.
en: A: Okay, if you have time, come back and play again.
